mapper.select: SELECT id as id, activityId as activityId, writeOffDate as writeOffDate, dealerId as dealerId, (select dealerName from dealer where id = dealerId) as dealerName, productId as productId, (select productName from product_config where id = productId) as productName, writeOffQuantity as writeOffQuantity, writeOffPrice as writeOffPrice, writeOffFee as write_off_info FROM write_off_info LIMIT #{start}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO write_off_info (activityId, writeOffDate, dealerId, productId, writeOffQuantity, writeOffPrice, writeOffFee ) VALUES( #{activityId}, #{writeOffDate}, #{dealerId}, #{productId}, #{writeOffQuantity}, #{writeOffPrice}, #{writeOffFee} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE write_off_info SET writeOffDate=#{writeOffDate}, dealerId=#{dealerId}, productId=#{productId},
writeOffQuantity=#{writeOffQuantity}, writeOffPrice=#{writeOffPrice}, writeOffFee=#{writeOffFee} WHERE id=#{id}
